narrative_hint: Three out of five active operations are COLLSCAN — full collection scans — on the orders and analytics collections. The two orders queries running 48 seconds each on customer_id filter are missing an index on customer_id. The analytics collection scan is also missing a compound index on event_type and date. The update operation is fast and properly indexed. Claude should identify the missing indexes on orders.customer_id and analytics.(event_type, date) as the primary issues causing the collection scans.
